name: Triller Group Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a global, artificial intelligence ( AI ) powered technology platform ( Technology Platform ) that serves a broad constituency of Creators and Brands around the world. Creators include influencers, artists, athletes, other individuals and public figures that utilize or have utilized our Technology Platform to create and publish content.
